title: Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub — Notion Template
description:
Stop juggling spreadsheets, brokerage apps, and scattered notes. The Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub is an all-in-one Notion workspace that brings your entire financial life into sharp focus — in one place.

Track every investment holding across stocks, ETFs, crypto, real estate, and bonds. Log every buy, sell, dividend, and distribution. Monitor your true ROI — including passive income — with built-in formulas that do the math for you. Budget your monthly income and expenses alongside your investment activity so you always know how much you can put to work. Set meaningful financial goals and watch your progress update in real time.

Designed for the DIY investor who is financially literate but tired of building from scratch, this template includes 6 fully structured databases, 20+ pre-built views, a visual home dashboard, and a step-by-step getting-started guide. Whether you want to hit a $500K portfolio, generate $2K/month in passive income, or simply get a clear net worth snapshot every month — this hub gives you the clarity to make confident, data-driven decisions.

Duplicate once. Update weekly. Invest with confidence.
